item.title: Prospect Mail [Email]
item.itunes:title: Prospect Mail [Email]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Prospect Mail
(Email)
Unofficial email Outlook client using Electron. It uses the Web App and wraps it as a standalone application using Electron. This only works for Microsoft/Office 365 accounts, don't use it for personal Outlook.com accounts.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Prospect Mail
(Email)
Unofficial email Outlook client using Electron. It uses the Web App and wraps it as a standalone application using Electron. This only works for Microsoft/Office 365 accounts, don't use it for personal Outlook.com accounts.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Prospect Mail
(Email)
Unofficial email Outlook client using Electron. It uses the Web App and wraps it as a standalone application using Electron. This only works for Microsoft/Office 365 accounts, don't use it for personal Outlook.com accounts.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: AppFlowy [Notes]
item.itunes:title: AppFlowy [Notes]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
AppFlowy
(Notes)
AppFlowy is an open-source alternative to Notion. You are in charge of your data and customizations.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

[read more]

item.title: stuntcarremake [Arcade]
item.itunes:title: stuntcarremake [Arcade]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
stuntcarremake
(Arcade)
This is a port to Linux & OpenPandora of Stunt Car Racer Remake, a windows remake of the old Stunt Car Racer from the AtariST/Amiga time.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

stuntcarremake

NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

stuntcarremake
(Arcade)

NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

item.title: RTS TV [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:title: RTS TV [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:author: rtstvapp
item.itunes:summary:
RTS TV
(TV & Streaming)
RTS TV is a free app using which you can watch and download any movie or web series absolutely free. RTS TV APK offers all language movies and web series. Using this, you can also watch movies on your mobile TV and laptop for free.
RTS TV APK Features:
1. Available Hollywood and Bollywood Movies
2. 1000+ Web Series
3. Live Cricket Match for Free
4. Easy Interface
5. Timely Update
[read more]
item.description:
RTS TV
(TV & Streaming)
RTS TV is a free app using which you can watch and download any movie or web series absolutely free. RTS TV APK offers all language movies and web series. Using this, you can also watch movies on your mobile TV and laptop for free.
RTS TV APK Features:
1. Available Hollywood and Bollywood Movies
2. 1000+ Web Series
3. Live Cricket Match for Free
4. Easy Interface
5. Timely Update
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RTS TV
(TV & Streaming)
RTS TV is a free app using which you can watch and download any movie or web series absolutely free. RTS TV APK offers all language movies and web series. Using this, you can also watch movies on your mobile TV and laptop for free.
RTS TV APK Features:
1. Available Hollywood and Bollywood Movies
2. 1000+ Web Series
3. Live Cricket Match for Free
4. Easy Interface
5. Timely Update
[read more]

item.title: Simple File Transfer [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Simple File Transfer [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: clearall2
item.itunes:summary:
Simple File Transfer
(Utilities)
[For Windows only]
This small application can send and receive files between Windows computers in local network.

If you have knowledge about networking or your network has IPv6, you can even transfer over the internet (instructions below).

Features:
-Send and receive multiple files.
-Send and receive simultaneously.
-Unlimited file size.
-Can transfer over local network or even the internet.
-Support both IPv4 and IPv6.
-Support UPnP protocol.
-Integrated Chat.
-Local Peers.
-Be updated automatically via SFT Updater.

Privacy policy:
-This product does not collect, save, transmit key strokes when user types in.
-This product does not access, collect, or transmit personal information (data that could be used to identify a person).
-This product does not share or transmit the data that user created by using this product.


Our suggestion for transfering files over the internet (if you don't have IPv6):
-Download and install free Radmin VPN at https://www.radmin-vpn.com
-Join/create your own network, share with friends.
-You can send/receive files now, using IP address from VPN.

If you have any question, send me an email to lkonle@proton.me
[read more]
item.description:
Simple File Transfer
(Utilities)
[For Windows only]
This small application can send and receive files between Windows computers in local network.

If you have knowledge about networking or your network has IPv6, you can even transfer over the internet (instructions below).

Features:
-Send and receive multiple files.
-Send and receive simultaneously.
-Unlimited file size.
-Can transfer over local network or even the internet.
-Support both IPv4 and IPv6.
-Support UPnP protocol.
-Integrated Chat.
-Local Peers.
-Be updated automatically via SFT Updater.

Privacy policy:
-This product does not collect, save, transmit key strokes when user types in.
-This product does not access, collect, or transmit personal information (data that could be used to identify a person).
-This product does not share or transmit the data that user created by using this product.


Our suggestion for transfering files over the internet (if you don't have IPv6):
-Download and install free Radmin VPN at https://www.radmin-vpn.com
-Join/create your own network, share with friends.
-You can send/receive files now, using IP address from VPN.

If you have any question, send me an email to lkonle@proton.me
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Simple File Transfer
(Utilities)
[For Windows only]
This small application can send and receive files between Windows computers in local network.

If you have knowledge about networking or your network has IPv6, you can even transfer over the internet (instructions below).

Features:
-Send and receive multiple files.
-Send and receive simultaneously.
-Unlimited file size.
-Can transfer over local network or even the internet.
-Support both IPv4 and IPv6.
-Support UPnP protocol.
-Integrated Chat.
-Local Peers.
-Be updated automatically via SFT Updater.

Privacy policy:
-This product does not collect, save, transmit key strokes when user types in.
-This product does not access, collect, or transmit personal information (data that could be used to identify a person).
-This product does not share or transmit the data that user created by using this product.


Our suggestion for transfering files over the internet (if you don't have IPv6):
-Download and install free Radmin VPN at https://www.radmin-vpn.com
-Join/create your own network, share with friends.
-You can send/receive files now, using IP address from VPN.

If you have any question, send me an email to lkonle@proton.me
[read more]
